label: Olivine
description: Green silicate mineral common in stony asteroids. Valuable for industrial silicate production.

label: Magnetite
description: Iron oxide with strong magnetic properties. Used in electronics and radiation shielding.

label: Iron Sulfides
description: Metallic sulfide ore. Feedstock for sulfuric acid production and steel alloys.

label: Carbonates
description: Calcium carbonate deposits. Essential for cement production in off-world construction.

label: Organic Compounds
description: Complex carbon chains preserved in carbonaceous rock. High scientific and pharmaceutical value.

label: Hydrated Silicates
description: Water-bearing silicate minerals. Can be processed to extract potable water in deep space.

label: Pyroxene
description: Dark silicate mineral rich in iron and magnesium. Used in refractory ceramics.

label: Plagioclase Feldspar
description: Light-colored silicate found in rocky asteroids. Aluminum feedstock for alloy production.

label: Iron-Nickel Alloy
description: Native metal from the core of a differentiated body. The most valuable mining commodity in the belt.

label: Water Ice
description: Frozen water extracted from icy bodies. Critical life support resource in deep space operations.

label: Troilite
description: Iron-sulfide mineral common in differentiated planetary cores. Feedstock for sulfuric acid production.

label: Enstatite
description: Magnesium-rich silicate found in chondrites and metallic asteroids. Used in refractory ceramics.

label: Carbon Dioxide Ice
description: Solid CO2 sublimating off cometary bodies. Used as propellant feedstock and life-support buffer.

label: Ammonia Hydrate
description: Frozen ammonia-water mixture from outer-system icy bodies. Industrial nitrogen feedstock.

label: Silicate Dust
description: Loose regolith of fragmented silicates. Bulk feedstock for sintered habitat construction blocks.

label: Sodium Chloride
description: Salt deposits leached from briny ice. Essential life-support consumable and chemical feedstock.

label: Basaltic Lava
description: Cooled volcanic glass from active silicate-iron bodies. Heat-resistant feedstock for hull plating.

label: Sulfur Deposits
description: Native sulfur condensed around volcanic vents. Industrial chemistry and propellant additive.

label: Iron Oxide
description: Rust-rich ore from oxidized surfaces. Standard steel feedstock for orbital foundries.

label: Carbonaceous Chondrite
description: Primordial carbon-rich matrix from the earliest Solar System. Rare scientific commodity and carbon feedstock for organic synthesis.

label: Organic Macromolecules
description: Complex prebiotic carbon chains preserved in D-type asteroid regolith. Extreme scientific and pharmaceutical value.

label: Volcanic Glass
description: Vitrified silicate fragments quenched by rapid cooling. Sharp-edged stock for cutting tools.

label: Lander Fuel Cell
description: Hydrogen fuel cell for the lander's neutron thrusters. Each cell provides one full burn cycle.

label: Shuttle Fuel Cell
description: Compact fusion cell for the shuttle's main drive. Restores half the fuel tank when consumed.

label: Repair Kit
description: Field repair package with hull patches and sealant. Restores structural integrity after hard landings.

label: Ammo Crate
description: Caseless ammunition for the mounted minigun. Each crate feeds approximately 500 rounds.

label: Oxygen Canister
description: Pressurized O2 supply for rescued colonists. Each canister extends survival time during extraction.

label: Gravity Surfing Module
description: USC-issued shuttle hardware. Once installed from inventory, the Space Fabric overlay lights up on the tactical map (M) and the shuttle can ride the spacetime grid lines — approach a line and press Q to lock on, WASD to pick the rail, Q again to drop free. Fast travel that costs you nothing but a moment of motion sickness.

label: Dark Lattice Coupler
description: Obsolete pre-production coupler. Manifold access is now issued as an MMC-approved avionics grant — this unit is a keepsake and cannot be installed.

label: Mining Drill
description: Industrial-grade rotary drill for mineral extraction. Required for GATHER objectives.

label: Mounted Minigun
description: Six-barrel rotary cannon with recoil compensation. Required for EXTERMINATE objectives. Newton's third law applies.

label: Rescue Winch
description: Electromagnetic winch for extracting colonists from alien cocoons. Required for RESCUE objectives.

label: Viroid Psychosphere
description: Residue siphoned from a downed viroid by the Cinderline-modified sidearm. The Anvil pigment room renders these into encaustum.

label: Sealed Ampoule Case
description: Biostable case from the Ceres Institute. Outer shell sealed; do not handle inner cassettes without equipment you do not have.

label: Sealed Sample Crate · Mineral Survey
description: Hand-readable crate of substrate cores and DAN-cross-referenced mineral readings, sealed for return to the Institute.

label: Sealed Sample Crate · DAN
description: Particle capture cassettes and field-stamped DAN albedo logs, sealed for return to the Institute.
